title: Supply Chain, Browser Binaries, Packages, Containers, and Rollout · Type-System Trace: Progressive Rollout
summary: The release trusts lifecycle scripts, downloads an untracked browser, ships dev residue and root permissions, rebuilds after approval, and rolls out without evidence comparison. Predict authorization, URL identity, runtime admission, Promise ownership, resource bounds, accessibility impact, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the crawler ts progressive rollout increment in source-bound least-authority crawler release. Learners progress thr…
